ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number within the training session */,
  "val_class_mae" REAL /* Validation class MAE */,
  "val_class_percent_2buckRange" REAL /* Validation class percentage within a 2-bucket range */,
  "val_class_mse" REAL /* Validation class MSE */,
  "acc" REAL /* Model accuracy */,
  "val_class_r2" REAL /* Validation class R-squared */,
  "val_class_rmse" REAL /* Validation class root mean squared error */,
  "train_class_mae" REAL /* Training class MAE */,
  "train_class_mse" REAL /* Training class MSE */,
  "train_class_r2" REAL /* Training class R-squared */,
  "train_class_rmse" REAL /* Training class root mean squared error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Account creation timestamp of the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Account update timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who should receive the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "initiator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is participating in the collaboration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being collaborated on */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being collaborated on */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., pending, active, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_initiator_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the model parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the model parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used for training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_datasets_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "configuration_name" TEXT /* Name of the model configuration */,
  "configuration_details" TEXT /* Details of the model configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert threshold */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id")
)
